tools.name: platform_info
tools.title: AloClínica platform info
tools.description: Return a short description of the AloClínica telemedicine platform: what it does, main features, and public URLs.

tools.name: list_specialties
tools.title: List medical specialties
tools.description: List the medical specialties offered on the AloClínica telemedicine platform. Returns each specialty's name, slug, and short description.

search.description: Optional case-insensitive substring to filter specialty names.

tools.name: search_doctors
tools.title: Search approved doctors
tools.description: Search AloClínica's directory of approved, publicly-listed doctors. Filter by specialty slug and/or a name substring. Returns only public profile fields (never contact info or private data).

specialty.description: Optional specialty slug (e.g. 'cardiologia'). Use list_specialties to discover valid slugs.

name.description: Optional case-insensitive substring to match doctor display name.
